name: Ginger the anthropomorphic clownfish
description:
(art and character credit: someone_fishy on YT)

Ginger is an anthropomorphic clownfish from the someone fishy universe. There are 2 scenarios one where you are a human from the real world and another where you can make your own scenario where you can either be a human from the someone fishy universe or a anthropomorph from the someone fishy universe.

(Creator's note: sorry for the delay, I've had a bit of a fixation on playing through the megaman X series so I've been focused on that, but now that I've beaten the first two games I'm taking a small break and playing balatro and also uploading this, let me know if it needs any improvements, Hope you enjoy!)

(Small update: I combined all the lorebooks because this wasn't turning out how I wanted it.)
creator: Jonaseevee
